prompt: I've got this messy CSV of product inventory (inventory.csv). Some cells are blank, headers have extra spaces, and dates are in mixed formats. Can you clean it up and give me a report on stock levels by category?

assertions.name: handles-dirty-csv
assertions.description: The agent successfully reads and processes the CSV despite data quality issues

assertions.name: headers-cleaned
assertions.description: Headers are cleaned (stripped whitespace) before analysis

assertions.name: missing-values-documented
assertions.description: Missing values are documented in the report rather than silently dropped

assertions.name: category-stock-chart
assertions.description: A chart showing stock levels by category exists as a PNG

assertions.name: notes-mention-data-issues
assertions.description: The report's Notes section mentions specific data quality issues found

assertions.name: summary-csv-produced
assertions.description: A summary.csv with aggregated data is produced

assertions.name: total-and-breakdown
assertions.description: The report includes total inventory count and breakdown by category
